     the Fermi energy is    -0.3459 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.97313499 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000001 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14940867 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.82372632 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -221865.45542710 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111961.33348960 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.90195058 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103821.18897782 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98881606 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.05 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.15 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  40 iterations
